scripts.lint: npm run lint:package && npm run lint:new-files && npm run lint:colors && npm run lint:contrast && eslint . && npm run lint:cycles && npm run lint:dead && npm run lint:types && npm run lint:i18n && npm run lint:licenses
scripts.lint:types: type-coverage --at-least 99.8 --strict && type-coverage -p src/main --at-least 99.8 --strict && type-coverage -p src/preload --at-least 99.8 --strict && type-coverage -p src/renderer --at-least 99.8 --strict
scripts.typecheck: tsc --noEmit && tsc --noEmit -p src/main && tsc --noEmit -p src/preload && tsc --noEmit -p src/renderer && tsc --noEmit -p tests/dom && tsc --noEmit -p .storybook
scripts.package: npm run build && electron-builder --publish never -c.mac.identity=null && npm run licenses:sbom
scripts.package:signed: npm run build && electron-builder --publish never && npm run licenses:sbom
scripts.package:signed:provisioned: npm run build && node scripts/package-signed-provisioned.mjs && npm run licenses:sbom
scripts.ci: npm run check:interop-acceptance && npm run lint && npm run format:check && npm run check:changesets && npm run check:acceptance-coverage && npm run check:a11y-budget && npm run test:cov && npm run build
scripts.test:dom:inner: npm run test:dom:compile && npm run test:dom:run
scripts.test:dom: node scripts/run-guarded.mjs --label test:dom -- npm run test:dom:inner
scripts.test:run: npm run test:unit:run && npm run test:dom:run
scripts.test:inner: npm run typecheck && npm run test:compile && npm run test:dom:compile && npm run test:run
scripts.test: node scripts/run-guarded.mjs --label test -- npm run test:inner
scripts.test:cov:inner: npm run typecheck && npm run test:compile && npm run test:dom:compile && c8 npm run test:run
scripts.test:cov: node scripts/run-guarded.mjs --label test:cov -- npm run test:cov:inner
scripts.test:pcloud:live: npm run test:compile && OVERLOOK_PCLOUD_LIVE=1 ELECTRON_RUN_AS_NODE=1 electron --test '.test-dist/tests/backup/pcloud-live-contract.test.js'
scripts.test:google-drive:live: npm run test:compile && OVERLOOK_GOOGLE_DRIVE_LIVE=1 ELECTRON_RUN_AS_NODE=1 electron --test '.test-dist/tests/backup/google-drive-live-contract.test.js'
scripts.test:e2e: node scripts/run-guarded.mjs --label test:e2e --rss-mb 8192 --timeout-s 1800 -- npm run test:e2e:inner
scripts.test:e2e:visible: node scripts/run-guarded.mjs --label test:e2e:visible --rss-mb 8192 --timeout-s 1800 -- npm run test:e2e:visible:inner
scripts.test:e2e:ui: node scripts/run-guarded.mjs --label test:e2e:ui --rss-mb 8192 --timeout-s 0 -- npm run test:e2e:ui:inner
scripts.test:e2e:headed: node scripts/run-guarded.mjs --label test:e2e:headed --rss-mb 8192 --timeout-s 0 -- npm run test:e2e:headed:inner
scripts.test:perf: node scripts/run-guarded.mjs --label test:perf --rss-mb 12288 --timeout-s 2700 -- npm run test:perf:inner
scripts.test:stories: node scripts/run-guarded.mjs --label test:stories --timeout-s 1200 -- npm run test:stories:inner
scripts.test:stories:ci:inner: rm -f test-results/a11y-visited-stories.txt && STORYBOOK_A11Y_TEST=off npm run build:storybook && concurrently -k -s first -n sb,test "http-server storybook-static --host 127.0.0.1 --port 6006 --silent" "wait-on tcp:127.0.0.1:6006 && OVERLOOK_A11Y_VISITED=test-results/a11y-visited-stories.txt test-storybook --url http://127.0.0.1:6006" && node scripts/check-a11y-budget.mjs --visited test-results/a11y-visited-stories.txt --lane stories
scripts.test:stories:ci: node scripts/run-guarded.mjs --label test:stories:ci --rss-mb 12288 --timeout-s 1800 -- npm run test:stories:ci:inner
